nodes.name: ADS_SCHEDULER_SETUP.md
nodes.summary: Setup guide for the Ads Scheduler background job, covering database migration, encryption key generation, Facebook App OAuth configuration, Railway environment variables, deployment verification, and the available alert-threshold commands and benchmarks.

nodes.name: APP_FUNCTIONS.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive functional reference for the Marketing OS bot describing overall architecture, Telegram commands, the Intake/Strategic/Operational/Analysis skill layers, pipelines and orchestrators, the Ads Scheduler reporting job, core background systems (LLM router, Industry Brain, Brand Voice, tone calibration, campaign history), and a migration checklist of what to carry into a new repo.

nodes.name: BACKLOG.md
nodes.summary: Running backlog log of completed product/engineering fixes and improvements (dated entries) covering competitor comparison, dead-code removal, ads generator gaps, content calendar restructuring, strategic-question flow dependencies, and budget/team-context sequencing changes.

nodes.name: DB_V2_MIGRATION_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step runbook for migrating to a v2 database schema via dual-write, covering Supabase migration application, backfill scripts, Railway branch switching, drift detection, cutover to v2 reads, post-cutover cleanup, and an emergency rollback matrix with success KPIs.

nodes.name: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Workflow 2.0 implementation plan with locked architecture decisions (Strategic, Campaign Bridge, Brand Voice, Content Execution layers), a sprint-by-sprint breakdown (DB schema, USP layer, retention integration, campaign brief, brand voice persistence, tone calibration, multi-agent orchestrator), dependency/risk registers, and a final roadmap.

nodes.name: LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md
nodes.summary: Short pre-launch checklist enumerating security gate items that must be resolved before opening the product to paying customers.

nodes.name: MAX_CMO_REFERENCE.md
nodes.summary: Reference map of the 'Max' CMO agent persona's functions and skills, detailing the strategic A-to-Z pipeline sequence, the Strategy-to-Campaign bridge (discovery, ideation, campaign brief), post-brief funnel mapping and execution planning, Layer 3 team coordination, and the main bot handler entry points tied to Max.

nodes.name: SCALE_BACKLOG.md
nodes.summary: Backlog of future-facing items to tackle when scaling the product or preparing it for sale to C-level/agency customers, including economics/feasibility gating, closing the measurement loop, and a multi-skin Strategy Object (Owner/C-level/Agency) concept.

nodes.name: markos-flow.md
nodes.summary: End-to-end walkthrough of the MarkOS user journey across all layers: entry/onboarding, profile-check gate, multi-turn intake, the six-stage strategic pipeline, operational skills (content calendar, content generator pipeline), tone calibration, LLM routing, Excel rendering paths, rating/feedback loop, and the full state-machine flag inventory, plus a list of known gaps from a prior audit.
